REEL BRIEF — Prakriti Sattva Brand Launch

Title: Nature's Intelligence, Bottled.
Type: Visual
Duration: 22-26 seconds

SCHEDULE
Date: Jun 20, 2026
Post time: 11 AM IST
Category: Brand Launch
Theme: Brand launch week

OBJECTIVE
Create product desire through tactile, cinematic, slow luxury visuals.

PRODUCTION TYPE
Product composite + macro ingredient shots + cinematic still holds + subtle motion.
Human skin/hands should look realistic, mature, elegant for a 35+ audience.

VISUAL SCRIPT
1. Turmeric root, freshly split. Golden interior, side-lit on pale marble. (3s)
2. Single rose petal falls onto the same marble surface. Slow motion. (4s)
3. Amber coloured oil drop suspended mid-fall against a soft dark background. (3s)
4. Full product range arranged on aged linen. Warm afternoon window light from left. (8s)
5. Prakriti Sattva logo, cream background, centred. Tagline fades in beneath. (7s)

Execution: Colour grade: warm ivory and ochre. No text overlays during visual sequence.

ON-SCREEN TEXT
Intro: Prakriti Sattva
Body: Pure. Ancient. Effective.
Outro: Shop the collection.

VOICEOVER
None. Let the visuals speak.

MUSIC & SOUND
Ambient instrumental — sitar meets cello. Soft, meditative, premium feel.

CAPTION
Rooted in nature. Perfected over centuries. Introducing Prakriti Sattva. 🌿 #NaturalBeauty #PrakritiSattva

CTA
Shop now → prakritisattva.com
Thumbnail hook: "Ancient wisdom, modern ritual."

QC NOTES
- No fast cuts. Every transition should breathe.
- No branded fonts on screen during visual sequence — logo only at the end.
